name: Penetrating Blast Spell
description: Notes This spell is quite different from tiered, shooting 8 shots that fire out only for a short distance before circling for a few seconds around the cast location. This makes it very easy to aim as it is highly likely that enemies will walk through the circling shots at one point or another.
effects: Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles Circular Motion after 0.125s; turns 90 degrees before circling
